title: REGENERATION HOUSE - 211info
text: REGENERATION HOUSE REGENERATION HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Overnight shelter with 16 beds. A shower and load of laundry is offered for guests. Dinner and sack breakfast provided for people staying overnight. Spaces are provided on a first-come, first-serve basis. May be open as an emergency shelter as space allows. 970 NW Madras Highway Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older experiencing homelessness. No one will be admitted under the influence of drugs or alcohol. Hours: 7 days per week 4pm-8am Email (541) 362-5642 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 362-5642 Main phone Main phone (541) 362-5642 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in at 4pm FEES: $1 per night or a chore DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 4pm-8pm Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Men If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
